title: selaginella devolii
intro: Selaginella devolii, also known as the "Spikemoss," is a type of evergreen, perennial plant species native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella devolii include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. In terms of herbal preparations, Selaginella devolii can be consumed as a tea or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
